## Plugin reference

- Description: Muted text placeholder for loading, empty, and error states. Props: children, tone (muted | error).
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
  - Exports: Types: `PlaceholderProps`; Values: `Placeholder`
